channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gov. Nwifuru Clarifies Relationship With Minister Umahi, Sets APC Agenda For 2027
item.description: Ebonyi State Governor, Francis Nwifuru, don clear all di gist wey dey about tension between am and Minister of Works, David Umahi. Nwifuru yan say all di talk about wahala na mere speculation wey some...

item.title: Kerala Assembly Election 2026: Vote Counting Schedule and Key Trends
item.description: The Kerala Assembly election 2026 promises a tight contest between the Left Democratic Front (LDF) and the United Democratic Front (UDF). Counting of votes will begin at 8am on May 4 across all 140 co...

item.title: Key Leaders and Constituencies to Watch in Kerala Assembly Polls 2026
item.description: Kerala is all set to announce the results of its 140-member assembly elections on 4th May 2026. The outcome will decide whether the CPM-led Left Democratic Front (LDF) continues in power for a third c...

item.title: China Surpasses US in Scientific Research Spending: Implications for Global Leadership
item.description: China has reached a significant milestone in scientific research, with its investment in research and development now matching or exceeding that of the United States when measured by purchasing power....

item.title: Vice Ganda Enjoys Fun Moments with Burundong and Osang on Everybody Sing
item.description: During a recent episode of 'Everybody Sing', Vice Ganda expressed delight at the cheerful and uplifting atmosphere brought by the guest performers Burundong and Osang. The segment showcased their vibr...

item.title: Rising Default Risks for First-Time Buyers Using the 5% Deposit Scheme
item.description: First-time home buyers in Australia are facing increasing financial pressure due to rising interest rates and climbing petrol prices, particularly those utilising the federal government's 5 per cent d...

item.title: Police union and community leaders condemn deadly attacks on officers in KwaZulu-Natal
item.description: Police killings in KwaZulu-Natal have sparked strong condemnation from both the KZN Community Policing Forum (CPF) Board and the Police and Prisons Civil Rights Union (Popcru), who describe the incide...

item.title: Sir Alex Ferguson Hospitalised Precautionarily Before Manchester United vs Liverpool Match
item.description: Sir Alex Ferguson, the legendary former Manchester United manager, was taken to hospital after falling unwell at Old Trafford shortly before the Premier League clash between Manchester United and Live...

item.title: ACT inquiry recommends major reforms to improve apartment living and strata management
item.description: Apartment living in Canberra is on the rise as more residents prefer units near schools, shops, and town centres over traditional houses with large gardens. Despite this growth, many apartment owners ...

item.title: Debate over M4 Relief Road in Wales Continues Amid Election Campaign
item.description: The proposal for an M4 relief road south of Newport has been under discussion for over 30 years, first suggested in 1991 to ease congestion through the Brynglas Tunnels. The plan was ultimately scrapp...

item.title: R.J. Barrett’s buzzer-beater lifts Raptors to Game 6 victory over Cavaliers
item.description: In a thrilling Game 6 matchup, the Toronto Raptors defeated the Cleveland Cavaliers 112-110 in overtime, thanks to a dramatic shot by R.J. Barrett. Trailing by one point in the final moments, Scottie ...

item.title: A personal reflection on motherhood, memory and the meaning behind Mother’s Day
item.description: In this reflective opinion piece, Sandy Kalyan shares a deeply personal account of what Mother’s Day has meant across different stages of her life, blending humour, nostalgia and cultural insight. Wha...

item.title: Ottawa man hospitalised after west-end motorcycle collision
item.description: A man is in serious condition after a motorcycle collision in Ottawa's west end, according to local authorities. The incident occurred earlier in the day, prompting a significant police presence at th...

item.title: OpenAI Adjusts ChatGPT After Unexpected Surge in ‘Goblin’ References
item.description: According to reports highlighted by The Wall Street Journal, OpenAI recently modified ChatGPT’s internal instructions after discovering that newer versions of the model had begun frequently referencin...

item.title: UP water tank accident leaves one child dead, two injured; IAF rescues children stranded atop tank
item.description: In Sidharth Nagar, Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, a tragic accident occurred when five children climbed a water tank to record a social media reel. The access stairs of the tank collapsed, causing three ch...

item.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill one and injure rescuers amid fragile truce
item.description: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon killed at least one person and wounded four rescuers, according to Lebanon’s health ministry. The reported attacks took place on Sunday, with one strike hitting Ara...

item.title: President Tinubu Begins Official Diplomatic Tour to France, Kenya, and Rwanda
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don japa from Nigeria go France as e start im three-nation diplomatic waka wey go still carry am go Kenya and Rwanda. The presidential plane comot from Abuja for Nnamdi Azikiwe I...

item.title: Joey Walsh impresses on debut as Penrith narrowly defeats Manly
item.description: Manly’s four-game winning streak came to an end on Sunday night when they were narrowly defeated 18-16 by Penrith at CommBank Stadium. Despite the loss, coach Kieran Foran described the performance as...

item.title: Charity confirms identities of two migrants who died in Channel boat accident
item.description: A charity organisation has confirmed that the two migrants who tragically lost their lives in a small boat incident in the English Channel were a 16-year-old girl and an adult woman. The incident high...

item.title: Celtic Edge Hibernian With Iheanacho’s Late Goal To Stay In Title Hunt
item.description: For one proper football match wey get wahala, Kelechi Iheanacho shine gidigba as Celtic carry three points come back from Hibernian for Easter Road. The Nigerian forward knack goal for 72nd minute, cl...
